restaurants.name: Agora Restaurant, Ephesus
restaurants.ambience: Charming outdoor terrace shaded by trees, blending casual comfort with fine-dining touches
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Old House Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Beautiful garden terrace offering a relaxed, leafy environment—popular for its friendly vibe and people-watching
must_try_dishes: Traditional Mediterranean Turkish dishes: grilled meats
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

restaurants.name: Mehmet & Ali Baba Kebab House
restaurants.ambience: Warm, casual family-run atmosphere with indoor and outdoor seating; very welcoming to families
must_try_dishes: Fresh pide or lahmacun (Turkish flatbread pizzas)
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

attractions.name: Library of Celsus
attractions.hours: 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM during summer months (April to October) and 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM during winter months (November to March)
source_files: Greece and Turkey/All Inclusive Guide - Greece and Turkey_Shital.pdf

attractions.name: House of Virgin Mary
